creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi i installed scipy in virtualenv-3.6 over pip3 but have some errors. 
OS: FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p12
 
Collecting scipy
  Using cached scipy-0.19.1.tar.gz
Building wheels for collected packages: scipy
